core_modules.description: Primary model container types; foundational for building optimization models programmatically.
Decision variable declarations and variable data handling.
Constraint declaration and indexed/scalar constraint handling.
Objective expression declaration and sense management (min/max).
Model parameter declaration, mutable/immutable parameter support.
Indexing and domain sets used by model components.
Factory API to instantiate solver interfaces by name.
High-level convenience import surface that re-exports core modeling symbols and utilities.
Main CLI entry dispatcher for the `pyomo` command family.
Top-level command execution integration for scripting commands.
